meaning_english: An extreme or irrational fear of heights.
Fear of flying or of drafts of air.
Fear of open spaces or being in crowded, public places.
Fear of being enclosed in a small, confined space.
Extreme or irrational fear of water.
Irrational fear of fire.
Fear of animals.
Passionate enthusiasm for collecting and possessing books.
A recurrent urge to steal, typically without regard for need or profit.
An obsessive desire to set fire to things.
An uncontrollable craving for alcoholic liquors.
A glass tank or bowl in which fish or other aquatic animals/plants are kept.
A botanical garden devoted to trees.
A hiding place, especially one in the ground, for ammunition, food, or treasures.
Trees that shed their leaves annually.
The animals of a particular region, habitat, or geological period.
The plants of a particular region, habitat, or geological period.
A part of a city occupied by a minority group or groups.
A collection of dried plant specimens arranged according to a botanical system.
A box or cage, typically with a wire mesh front, for keeping rabbits.
So good or unusual as to be impossible to copy.
Impossible to solve or (of a substance) impossible to dissolve.
Impossible to harm or damage.
A wild animal's resting place, especially one that is well hidden.
A room or large cupboard for storing food.
A solution or remedy for all difficulties or diseases.

meaning_kannada: ಕಲಾವಿದನ ಕೆಲಸಗಳ ಸಂಗ್ರಹ ಅಥವಾ ಸಚಿವ ಖಾತೆ
meaning_english: A large, thin, flat case for loose sheets of paper or a collection of a person's work.
A large natural or artificial lake used as a source of water supply.
A small kitchen or room at the back of a house used for washing dishes.
A large, tall cupboard in which clothes may be hung or stored.
